report_metadata.title: Zenith Commerce — Datadog Security Monitoring Coverage Report

partially_monitored_services.gaps: Only error rate and availability alerts configured. Missing: authentication failure monitoring, latency anomaly detection, data access monitoring. Service replaced recommendation-engine-v1 (deprecated December 7). Integration ticket SEC-8834 completed December 10 for agent installation; alert rule configuration in progress.
partially_monitored_services.data_sensitivity: Processes customer browsing behavior, purchase history, and personalization preferences. Serves 4.2M recommendation requests/day.

unmonitored_services.reason: Sidecar container deployed alongside payment-gateway. Runs as a separate process within the same EKS pod. Datadog agent on the payment-gateway host collects payment-gateway logs but not fraud-detection-sidecar logs (separate log stream). Sidecar uses a custom binary with proprietary log format from vendor FraudShield Inc. Integration requires vendor cooperation for log format documentation.
unmonitored_services.data_sensitivity: Analyzes all payment transactions for fraud signals in real-time. Processes customer payment data, IP addresses, device fingerprints, and transaction metadata. Handles approximately 340K transactions/day.
unmonitored_services.compensating_controls: FraudShield vendor provides a hosted dashboard with their own alerting. Zenith Commerce security team does not have direct access to raw sidecar logs.

details.alert: P3 — new service without Datadog agent
P3 — new service without Datadog agent
details.resolution: Resolved December 10 — agent installed within 2 business days
